A National Weather Service Storm Survey confirmed an EF1 tornado on 4/3/2024 in Richmond and Northumberland Counties. The tornado touched down near Luttrellville Lane and Chevy Place in Richmond County. The tornado was on the ground for 6 minutes before lifting near US 360 and Glebe Road in Northumberland County.

Planes shifted westward due to wind at the Chesapeake Regional Airport.

On July 18th a severe storm impacted the Chesapeake Regional Airport damaging several aircraft. 4 airplanes were dislodged from the tie down spaces while other aircraft sustained damage of varying degrees. The airport suffered minimal damage. The Luscombe was tossed into the maintenance hangar door and has disabled the opening and closing mechanism.
